Freeze-dried coffee, considered the world’s finest form of instant coffee, is made by subjecting coffee to very low temperatures, preserving its alluring aroma and flavour. product_name: NAARIO Coffee- Authentic | No Chemicals | Boosts Mood, 200 ml Bottle
product_description: Don’t we end up going to a fancy cafe every now and then just for the experience? The laughter of friends in a room filled with a strong aroma. This coffee brings you the same experience in a fresh and instant format. Ah, we want to grab a cup right now! This coffee comes from the Araku valley region of Eastern Ghats. The indigenous tribes of the area have been growing and nurturing the coffee plantations their own way- no chemicals or pesticides. Wait, wait, wait. Poori baat toh sun lo! This is fresh, aromatic, traditional south Indian filter kaapi crafted with a lot of attention to detail. There’s a mother’s love that pours out of the bottle with no harmful chemicals whatsoever! Our team hasn’t been drinking anything else since we discovered this. Need we say more? The beans used are a mix of Arabica and Robusta and then some Chicory. It’s a beautiful effort to bridge the gap between North and South India with something that’s dear to both- the experiences and conversations around coffee!
